message:
Ignore local .env files in franken_networkx

Add `.env` to .gitignore so dotenv-style secret overlays (API keys,
local database URLs, feature flag toggles) do not get accidentally
committed alongside the existing top-level `/*.py`, `/*.sh`, `/*.out`
scratch-file ignores.

Scope of this rule:

- Matches any `.env` anywhere in the tree, not just the repo root, which
  is the pattern most tooling (dotenv, direnv, vite, next) looks for.
- Leaves `.env.example` / `.env.sample` untracked behavior unchanged —
  they are distinct filenames and are not ignored by this pattern, so
  example dotfiles can still be committed for documentation.

This aligns with the existing "ignore local build/config overlays"
section of the file rather than the artifact section further up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
